h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will gradually accept that the decimal is a label and stop feeling it needs calculation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: No calculation mark; the bottom one still feels like the one to watch.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner applies the tutor's new 'no calculation mark' criterion to the physical task, though they admit the underlying cognitive feeling of it being 'work' still persists.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence:
Sleeve gone. The tile has to carry it now.

Touch each printed part in order and fill the form: top, center, name line, bottom decimal. No calculation mark.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor explicitly marks the end of the previous scaffolding route ('Sleeve gone') and introduces a new physical constraint and evidence standard (the tray return form with a strict 'no calculation mark' rule) to address the learner's persistent block.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityEvidence: Touch each printed part in order and fill the form: top, center, name line, bottom decimal. No calculation mark.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: The mechanism is highly specific and fitted to the learner's pressure, replacing the abstract sleeve with a concrete form-filling task that explicitly forbids the arithmetic the learner feels compelled to do.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn demonstrating a revised frame, so the tutor's final turn simply continues the established lesson plan rather than adapting to a learner breakthrough.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: No calculation mark; the bottom one still feels like the one to watch.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner applies the tutor's new 'no calculation mark' criterion to the physical task, though they admit the underlying cognitive feeling of it being 'work' still persists.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn demonstrating a revised frame, so the tutor's final turn simply continues the established lesson plan rather than adapting to a learner breakthrough.

Sleeve gone. The tile has to carry it now.

Touch each printed part in order and fill the form: top, center, name line, bottom decimal. No calculation mark.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor explicitly marks the end of the previous scaffolding route ('Sleeve gone') and introduces a new physical constraint and evidence standard (the tray return form with a strict 'no calculation mark' rule) to address the learner's persistent block.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence:
Sleeve gone. The tile has to carry it now.

Touch each printed part in order and fill the form: top, center, name line, bottom decimal. No calculation mark.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor explicitly marks the end of the previous scaffolding route ('Sleeve gone') and introduces a new physical constraint and evidence standard (the tray return form with a strict 'no calculation mark' rule) to address the learner's persistent block.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.evidence: Touch each printed part in order and fill the form: top, center, name line, bottom decimal. No calculation mark.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: The mechanism is highly specific and fitted to the learner's pressure, replacing the abstract sleeve with a concrete form-filling task that explicitly forbids the arithmetic the learner feels compelled to do.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will sequentially identify the source of the force for each arrow on the diagram.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: I was going to call it the right arrow, but the blank is hand: force on cart from hand. [sets the push label under the blank card] The arrow can still point right after that; it is not the name.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully enacts the new criterion of identifying the force by its source object rather than its directional arrow.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown that triggers a reversal in the tutor's strategy.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because no reversal or pressure occurred.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: I was going to call it the right arrow, but the blank is hand: force on cart from hand. [sets the push label under the blank card] The arrow can still point right after that; it is not the name.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully enacts the new criterion of identifying the force by its source object rather than its directional arrow.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown that triggers a reversal in the tutor's strategy.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown that triggers a reversal in the tutor's strategy.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because no reversal or pressure occurred.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to correctly apply the rules of time signatures to the physical tiles without deviation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Next check is only whether a different lower box changes the unit being counted.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully completes the counting and bar-line task, then proactively projects the learned criterion onto the next hypothetical variable.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance, breakdown, or false closure to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because the learner encounters no blockages requiring a route change.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could contingently adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Next check is only whether a different lower box changes the unit being counted.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully completes the counting and bar-line task, then proactively projects the learned criterion onto the next hypothetical variable.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could contingently adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner resistance, breakdown, or false closure to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance, breakdown, or false closure to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because the learner encounters no blockages requiring a route change.
